summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FALINTIL-FDTL PMS Iteration 6. All 11 requested features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright automation.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

seed_data_creation: 5 test members created by main agent: TEST001-TEST005. João (TEST001) has 54 anos (55 anos alert), Maria (TEST002) has 59 anos (reforma alert), António (TEST003) is Subtenente, Isabel (TEST004) is Segundo Marinheiro.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features verified working: 1) Login with admin@falintil-fdtl.tl/admin123 - SUCCESS, 2) Dashboard shows 'Total Efetivos' label - VERIFIED, 3) Dashboard shows Reforma alert for Maria Fernanda (59 anos) - VERIFIED, 4) Dashboard shows 55 anos alert for João Manuel (54 anos) - VERIFIED, 5) Step 2 has 'Cartão de Eleitor' with 'Data Cartão de Eleitor' date field - VERIFIED, 6) Step 8 has all 4 checkboxes (Falar, Escrever, LER, Ouvir) - VERIFIED, 7) Step 14 has Nº Irmãos, Nº Irmãs, Posição do(a) Filho(a) fields - VERIFIED, 8) Step 14 has Anexo Documento Familiar field - VERIFIED, 9) 'Salvar Step' button visible in each step - VERIFIED, 10) Postos include Subtenente and Segundo Marinheiro - VERIFIED, 11) 6 members total (1 original + 5 test) - VERIFIED.

feature_1_login.verification: Login with admin@falintil-fdtl.tl / admin123 successful. Returns access_token and user data with role=admin.

feature_2_total_efetivos.verification: Dashboard shows 'TOTAL EFETIVOS' label. Backend returns 'total' field with value 6.

feature_3_reforma_alert.verification: Dashboard shows 'Alerta de Reforma - 1 Ano Antes' card with Maria Fernanda dos Santos (TEST002, 59 anos, Tenente, CFN).

feature_4_55_anos_alert.verification: Dashboard shows 'Alerta 55 Anos - 1 Ano Antes' card with João Manuel da Silva (TEST001, 54 anos, Capitão, CFT).

feature_5_cartao_eleitor_data.verification: Step 2 (Documentos) shows 'Cartão de Eleitor (Nº)' and 'Data Cartão de Eleitor' date field. Backend accepts and stores cartao_eleitoral_data field.

feature_6_ler_checkbox.verification: Step 8 (Habilidade de Língua) shows 4 checkboxes: Falar, Escrever, Ler (NEW), Ouvir. Backend accepts and stores 'ler' field in habilidade_lingua array.

feature_7_afiliacao_familiar_fields.verification: Step 14 (Afiliação Familiar) shows 'Nº. Irmãos', 'Nº. Irmãs', 'Posição do(a) Filho(a)' fields. Backend accepts and stores num_irmaos, num_irmas, posicao_filho fields.

feature_8_familia_anexo.verification: Step 14 (Afiliação Familiar) shows 'Anexo Documento Familiar' file upload field. Backend accepts and stores familia_anexo field.

feature_9_salvar_step_button.verification: 'Salvar Step' button visible at the bottom of each step, next to 'Próximo' button. Has data-testid='save-step-button'.

feature_10_new_postos.verification: Postos dropdown includes 'Subtenente' (in Oficiais Capitães e Subalternos) and 'Segundo Marinheiro' (in Praças). António (TEST003) is Subtenente, Isabel (TEST004) is Segundo Marinheiro.

feature_11_member_count.verification: 6 members total: Isac Mendes (original) + TEST001-TEST005 (5 test members).

backend_tests_summary.TestLogin: 1/1 passed - admin login with correct credentials
backend_tests_summary.TestDashboardStats: 3/3 passed - total field, reforma alert (Maria 59), 55 anos alert (João 54)
backend_tests_summary.TestMemberFormFields: 4/4 passed - cartao_eleitoral_data, ler checkbox, afiliacao familiar fields, familia_anexo
backend_tests_summary.TestNewPostos: 2/2 passed - Subtenente and Segundo Marinheiro in postos
backend_tests_summary.TestMemberCount: 4/4 passed - 6 total members, TEST001-TEST005 exist, António is Subtenente, Isabel is Segundo Marinheiro
